notes: Generated in the parent thread using the built-in image generation tool.
Final board follows the existing vertical project character-board layout: three state panels plus lower detail and material panels.

Visual identity now preserves Helian Xuedai as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female warrior guard with an oppressive human face, real biological bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, narrow murderous eyes, strong guard build, and elite tribal equipment.
The final board explicitly avoids the prior bear-face beast-head direction, prior Frosthoof deer guard direction, and v03 soft face / fake-ear read.

The locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem was not redesigned. Northern symbol language appears as bear-claw cuts, bonewood, rawhide cord, oath cord, shield scratches, jade, bronze, and object materials rather than a new crest or public badge.
Rejected v001 deer-clan attempt, v002 bear-face attempt, and v03 fake-ear / insufficient-pressure attempt were retained in history before canonical replacement.
No unfiled v04 rejected Helian Xuedai candidate was retained.
No background Codex thread was created because this was a single-asset direct parent generation.
